Admiral w. S. Schley and Colonel
A. K. Mcclure and party will spend
two hours in Spokane the evening
of April /.


new time table will go into eff
feet on the Northern Pacific April s,
shortening the time to meet the COM
petition of the Great Northern.


Livery stable men have raised the
prices for boarders from SIS and
SIS per month to SIS and $50. Prices
for rented teams will also be raised.


Anthony Gibbon, barber. was found
guilty Saturday of attempting GRIM
inal assault on Maud Coxhead, the
girl who masqueraded as a messenger
boy


Word has been received from
Washington that the Spokane federal
building site has been approved and
warrant drawn for the purchase
amount.


B. c. Bedell Of Walla Walla has
refused to change the date Of the
G. A. r. encampment of the depart
ment of Washington and Alaska from
June % to May 26.


Lewis II. Swan, millman OF North
Tonawanda. N. Y, has written the
chamber of commerce Offering to put
in a 100000 lumber mill in Spokane
il 10 acres are given him as a bonus.


It is understood that the recent
visit of John Malone. the Tacoma
gambler in Spokane. means that the
gamblers of the state will unite forces
and make a test case of the new
ant!-gambling law.


Miss Margaret Dolan, who was ac-
cidentally hit in the head with a
stick of cordwood last December, has
brought suit for s10,150 damages
against the Northwestern Improve
ment company and William Gray.


General Land Commissioner Rich
ards has issued circular in refer
ence to the north kalf of the Col
vile reservation. the most important
point in which is the repeal of the
requirement of an additional $3.50 per
acre for homestead lands.
